query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.location,
  p.priority,
  p.owner,
  p.stage,
  p.value,
  p.timeline,
  LEFT(p.overview, 250) as overview,
  LEFT(p.opportunityNote, 150) as opportunityNote,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE 
  p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND (p.location LIKE '%QLD%' OR p.location LIKE '%NT%')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
  AND JSON_CONTAINS(p.matchedBusinessLines, '1')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.location, p.priority, p.owner, p.stage, p.value, p.timeline, p.overview, p.opportunityNote
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm'), p.id ASC
LIMIT 20 OFFSET 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.location,
  p.priority,
  p.owner,
  p.stage,
  p.value,
  p.timeline,
  LEFT(p.overview, 250) as overview,
  LEFT(p.opportunityNote, 150) as opportunityNote,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE 
  p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND (p.location LIKE '%QLD%' OR p.location LIKE '%NT%')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
  AND JSON_CONTAINS(p.matchedBusinessLines, '1')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.location, p.priority, p.owner, p.stage, p.value, p.timeline, p.overview, p.opportunityNote
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm'), p.id ASC
LIMIT 20 OFFSET 20;

rows.name: New 12ML reservoir on Sunshine Coast
rows.overview: Unitywater has opened a new 12-megalitre water reservoir on the Sunshine Coast, servicing 21,000 future residents. This reservoir is part of a larger $2 billion upgrade program by Unitywater.
rows.opportunityNote: The opening of the reservoir indicates completion of that specific asset, but it is part of a larger $2 billion upgrade program. This larger program w

rows.name: Snowy 2.0 Hydroelectric Project
rows.stage: Under Construction - facing delays and cost overruns
rows.overview: The Snowy 2.0 pumped-hydro expansion project is facing budget exhaustion, delays, and cost overruns. It involves significant underground tunnelling and infrastructure development.
rows.opportunityNote: Project is ongoing but facing significant challenges. Potential for equipment sales (portable air, pumps, generators) to existing contractors or new c

rows.name: Sugarbag Hill Ultra High Purity Quartz Sand Project
rows.overview: The Queensland Government has declared the Sugarbag Hill Ultra High Purity Quartz Sand Project a prescribed development, streamlining approvals for the proposed quarry and processing operations. The project includes a quarry at Sugarbag Hill, pre-pro
rows.opportunityNote: Quarry operations will require portable air compressors for drilling and blasting, generators for power, and pumps for dewatering. Processing plants m

rows.name: North-West Queensland Copper Development
rows.stage: Secured key regulatory support, improving approval certainty; tender pipeline visibility
rows.overview: A large-scale resources development in north-west Queensland has secured key regulatory support, improving approval certainty. The project has a value of $2.3 billion.
rows.opportunityNote: This large-scale copper development is moving through approvals with a clear tender pipeline. This is a significant direct CAPEX opportunity for power

rows.name: Toowoomba to Warwick Pipeline Project
rows.overview: A new 111km pipeline project in south-east Queensland, built in two stages. Includes pump upgrades at Leslie Dam.
rows.opportunityNote: Opportunity for dewatering pumps (PAS/WEDA series) for pipeline construction and pump upgrades. Generators (QAS/QES) for power. Portable air compresso

rows.name: Taroom Trough Oil and Gas Field Development
rows.overview: The Queensland Government is targeting the Taroom Trough, a 750-square-kilometre oil and gas field in central Queensland, to mitigate the fuel crisis. This involves unlocking and developing the field.
rows.opportunityNote: Development of an oil and gas field will require significant drilling and potentially power generation and pumping equipment. Monitor for specific dri

rows.name: ECSP Gas Project

rows.overview: AGL has signed a Gas Sales Agreement (GSA) with Amplitude for gas from the ECSP project. The deal is contingent on the results of the current drilling campaign. This indicates ongoing exploration and potential development of a gas field.
rows.opportunityNote: Monitor drilling results and potential for field development. Direct sales to Amplitude for drilling equipment (air compressors) and potentially to AG

rows.name: ECSP Gas Supply Agreement with AGL
rows.overview: AGL has signed a Gas Supply Agreement (GSA) with Amplitude for ECSP gas. The deal's progression is contingent on the results of Amplitude's current drilling campaign.
rows.opportunityNote: The current drilling campaign by Amplitude is critical for this gas supply deal. There is potential for portable air compressors for drilling operatio

rows.name: Copper Sulphate Production Project
rows.overview: Tartana Minerals is progressing plans for copper sulphate production at its project near Chillagoe, Queensland.
rows.opportunityNote: Tartana Minerals is progressing copper sulphate production plans. This indicates potential for portable air, power generation, and pumping equipment f

rows.overview: GBM Resources is conducting Stage 2 drilling at the Lone Sister prospect within its Twin Hills project, confirming high-grade gold mineralisation. This drilling aims to support a potential resource upgrade, with a Mineral Resource Estimate (MRE) expe
rows.opportunityNote: Ongoing RC drilling campaign indicates a need for portable air compressors. Potential for Portable Air division to supply the operator or drilling con

rows.name: Bonaparte CCS Project
rows.overview: INPEX has resubmitted its Bonaparte Carbon Capture and Storage (CCS) plan for federal government assessment. The project aims to capture and store CO2 in the offshore Bonaparte Basin.
rows.opportunityNote: This is a large-scale energy transition project. If approved, it will involve significant construction and operational phases, potentially requiring p

rows.name: Omega Oil and Gas Drilling Program
rows.overview: Omega Oil and Gas has halted ASX trading to raise funds for an upcoming drilling program. The specific details of the program, including location within Queensland, drill types, and exact timing, are contingent on successful fundraising.
rows.opportunityNote: Omega Oil and Gas is seeking funding for a drilling program in Queensland. This presents a potential direct CAPEX opportunity for portable air compres

rows.name: Silver Valley Project
rows.overview: Litchfield Minerals is conducting sampling at its Silver Valley project, showing high-grade polymetallic mineralisation. This indicates potential for future drilling and development.
rows.opportunityNote: Early-stage exploration with promising sampling results. Monitor for upcoming drilling campaigns at Silver Valley. Potential for portable air compress

rows.overview: This tender is for minor construction and maintenance works at the Mount Barker Police Station. While the scope is 'minor works', general building and facility construction often requires various tools and equipment, including portable air compressor
rows.opportunityNote: NULL

rows.name: Queensland Coal and Gold Projects (unnamed)
rows.overview: The Queensland Government has fast-tracked the development of two major coal and gold projects. Specific project names and details are not provided, but this indicates renewed focus and potential for new mining operations in Queensland.
rows.opportunityNote: Monitor for specific project announcements and contractor awards. Potential for portable air, PAL, and pump equipment sales once projects are detailed

rows.name: Northern Territory Underground Mining Development

rows.opportunityNote: Significant opportunity for Portable Air (underground mining compressors), PAL (generators, lighting towers) and Pumps (dewatering). Monitor contracto

rows.name: Lady Loretta Copper Acquisition & Development
rows.stage: Acquisition complete, advancing Anthill and Flying Horse
rows.overview: Austral Resources has completed the acquisition of Lady Loretta, becoming debt-free with approximately $83 million cash. The company is advancing its Anthill and Flying Horse projects as part of its North-West Queensland copper strategy.
rows.opportunityNote: Ongoing development of Anthill and Flying Horse copper projects suggests potential for portable air compressors for drilling/blasting, pumps for dewat

rows.name: Beenleigh Station Precinct Upgrade
rows.overview: The Queensland Government has released updated designs for the new Beenleigh station precinct, marking another step towards a more reliable and better-connected rail network for South East Queensland.
rows.opportunityNote: Rail infrastructure project. Potential for portable air compressors for construction, generators for site power, lighting towers for night work, and d

rows.name: Graphite-to-anode plant
rows.overview: Queensland facility targets battery markets amid rising global graphite supply and demand. Project links mining to anodes.
rows.opportunityNote: This project is commissioned, suggesting potential for OPEX/Monitor opportunities for ongoing operations or future expansions. Portable air, generator
